texto: For a moment we sit in silence. Eventually, I turn to him and say, "Do you believe in God?" His eyes narrow for a moment and he stares at me at me for a while. Stares in a rather intense way, like a doctor looking at a troubling X-ray. Then he looks out the and says in a voice like shattered glass, "Only in storms.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rebecca Sparrow: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “For a moment we sit in silence. Eventually, I turn to him and say, "Do you believe in God?" His e…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, belief, death pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e dia-chuvoso.
